{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions one prior work (box-uncertainty robust constraints) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta or compare against other relevant methods.",
    "R1.7": "Fails to identify any missing or wrong citations.",
    "RX.1": "All claims presented with equal confidence, no indication of uncertainty for specific claims.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested active set (V2G dispatch under uncertain prices and availability), but there is a slight drift towards discussing the aggregation method in detail.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions identified; the critique focuses on potential improvements and doesn't introduce new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are not traced, minor edits are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions one prior work (box-uncertainty robust constraints) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta or compare against other relevant methods.
rationale.R1.7: Fails to identify any missing or wrong citations.
rationale.RX.1: All claims presented with equal confidence, no indication of uncertainty for specific claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested active set (V2G dispatch under uncertain prices and availability), but there is a slight drift towards discussing the aggregation method in detail.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; the critique focuses on potential improvements and doesn't introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are not traced, minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
